measures.description: Members 18-64 who had at least one comprehensive well-care visit with a PCP in the measurement year.
measures.denominator: Commercial and Medicaid members age 18-64 continuously enrolled
measures.numerator: At least one well-care visit in the measurement year
measures.closure_criteria: Documentation of one comprehensive wellness visit billed under appropriate CPT/HCPCS codes
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No annual wellness visit on file for current measurement year

measures.description: Members 18-85 with a diagnosis of hypertension whose most recent blood pressure was adequately controlled (<140/90 mmHg).
measures.denominator: Members 18-85 with a diagnosis of hypertension
measures.numerator: Most recent BP reading with systolic <140 and diastolic <90 mmHg
measures.closure_criteria: BP reading <140/90 mmHg documented in claims or clinical data within measurement year
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No qualifying BP reading on file; last recorded BP was above threshold

measures.description: Members 18-75 with diabetes (T1 or T2) who had HbA1c tested and controlled (<8%) in the measurement year.
measures.denominator: Members 18-75 with T1 or T2 diabetes
measures.numerator: HbA1c test performed AND most recent result <8.0%
measures.closure_criteria: HbA1c lab result with value <8.0% within measurement year
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No HbA1c test on file for current measurement year, or last result ≥8.0%

measures.full_name: Care for Older Adults - Medication Review
measures.description: Members 66+ who had a medication review performed by a prescribing practitioner or clinical pharmacist in the measurement year.
measures.numerator: At least one medication review performed in measurement year
measures.closure_criteria: Medication review documented with appropriate CPT code during a qualifying visit
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No medication review on file; member on 5+ medications (polypharmacy risk)

measures.description: Members 45-75 who had appropriate colorectal cancer screening. Accepted screenings include colonoscopy, FIT, FOBT, stool DNA test, or CT colonography.
measures.numerator: Colonoscopy (10 yr look-back), FIT/FOBT (1 yr), stool DNA (3 yr), CT colonography (5 yr)
measures.closure_criteria: Qualifying screening test documented within the required look-back period
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No qualifying colorectal screening on file within the required time window

measures.full_name: Follow-Up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness
measures.description: Members 6+ who were hospitalized for a mental illness or intentional self-harm and had a follow-up visit within 30 days of discharge.
measures.denominator: Members 6+ discharged from acute inpatient mental health facility
measures.numerator: Follow-up visit with mental health provider within 7 or 30 days of discharge
measures.closure_criteria: Documented outpatient mental health follow-up within 30 days of inpatient discharge
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No follow-up mental health visit within 30 days of hospital discharge

measures.description: Members 18+ discharged from acute or non-acute facility who had medications reconciled by a prescribing practitioner within 30 days of discharge.
measures.denominator: Members 18+ discharged from acute or non-acute inpatient setting
measures.numerator: Medication reconciliation performed within 30 days of discharge
measures.closure_criteria: Medication reconciliation note from a qualifying provider within 30 days of discharge
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No medication reconciliation on file within 30 days post-discharge

measures.description: Women 67-85 who suffered a fracture and were either tested for osteoporosis (DXA scan) or treated with a bone-strengthening medication within 6 months of the fracture.
measures.denominator: Women 67-85 with a fracture in the first 6 months of the measurement year
measures.numerator: BMD/DXA scan OR osteoporosis medication dispensed within 6 months of fracture
measures.closure_criteria: DXA claim or osteoporosis Rx fill within 6 months of qualifying fracture
measures.typical_outreach_reason: Fracture on record but no DXA or bone-density medication within 6 months

measures.full_name: Statin Therapy for Patients with Cardiovascular Disease
measures.description: Males 21-75 and females 40-75 with clinical ASCVD who were dispensed at least one statin medication of moderate or high intensity in the measurement year.
measures.denominator: Members with clinical ASCVD (MI, stable/unstable angina, coronary revascularization, stroke, PVD)
measures.numerator: At least one statin Rx fill of moderate or high intensity in measurement year
measures.closure_criteria: Statin pharmacy fill of qualifying intensity on file for measurement year
measures.typical_outreach_reason: No statin Rx on file despite clinical ASCVD diagnosis

measures.description: Members 18+ discharged from acute inpatient facilities who had a timely discharge summary, medication reconciliation, and follow-up visit within defined windows.
measures.denominator: Members 18+ with an acute inpatient discharge
measures.numerator: All three: discharge summary transmitted, medication reconciliation, and follow-up visit within required timeframes
measures.closure_criteria: Documentation of all three TRC components within the required post-discharge windows
measures.typical_outreach_reason: Missing one or more TRC components post-discharge (no follow-up, no med rec, or no discharge summary)
